title: Department of Economics and Finance (English) - Message from the Head of the Department
content:
Department of Economics and Finance (English) - Message from the Head of the Department

“Dear Students,

Welcome to the Department of Economics and Finance (English). In today’s world, economic and financial developments affect not only markets, but also business strategies, public policies, and social welfare. For this reason, the need for individuals with solid knowledge in economics and finance, strong analytical skills, and an international perspective is greater than ever. Our department offers an English program that brings together economics and finance within an integrated framework and prepares students for both professional and academic life. We attach great importance to graduating students who can understand the relationship between theory and practice, use quantitative methods effectively, think critically, and act with ethical awareness. Our aim is to prepare our students not only for today’s business environment, but also for the uncertainties and opportunities of the future. In line with this objective, the educational process in our department is shaped by a student-centered, participatory, and continuously improving academic approach. We continue our work with the goal of educating graduates who are competent in economics and finance, self-confident, and able to compete at an international level. I believe that all students who choose our department will experience a high-quality education and acquire a strong academic and professional foundation.

Welcome again.”

Head of Department

This content was updated on 06/04/2026.
